name: CHARTER COMMUNICATIONS, INC. /MO/
summary: Charter Communications, Inc. is a leading broadband connectivity company operating under the Spectrum brand, offering Internet (up to 1 Gbps and multi-gigabit speeds), mobile (5G-enabled), video (including streaming via Xumo Stream Boxes), and voice services. Available to 58 million homes and businesses across 41 states, Charter serves residential and commercial customers and is actively upgrading its fiber-powered network to support symmetrical multi-gigabit speeds by 2027.

products.name: Spectrum Internet
products.description: Broadband Internet service with speeds up to 1 Gbps across entire footprint and multi-gigabit speeds in portions.

products.name: Spectrum Mobile
products.description: 5G-enabled mobile service available to Spectrum Internet customers, no contracts, taxes and fees included in price.

products.name: Spectrum TV
products.description: Video service with flexible packaging, ad-supported streaming apps, and a la carte options for programmers.

products.name: Spectrum Voice
products.description: Residential and commercial voice service offered as standalone or bundled with other Spectrum products.

products.name: Advanced WiFi
products.description: Managed WiFi service offering optimized home networking, device control, enhanced security and privacy for Internet customers.

products.name: Xumo Stream Box
products.description: Streaming device enabling seamless access to video content and streaming applications for Spectrum customers.

partnerships.description: Pending Liberty Broadband Combination transaction with definitive merger agreement; joint proxy statement/prospectus filed January 22, 2025.
Pending Cox Transactions under a transaction agreement; definitive proxy statement filed July 2, 2025.
Deployment of Xumo Stream Boxes to deliver streaming video content and entertainment to Spectrum customers.
